seoTitle: Montrose vs Montumana — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Montrose and Montumana. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Montrose and Montumana.
heading: Montrose vs Montumana — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Montrose, Tasmania and Montumana, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Montrose has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Montumana (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Montrose or Montumana safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Montrose has a flood risk score of 43/100, while Montumana scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Montrose scores 57/100 for bushfire risk. Montumana scores 35/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Montrose or Montumana?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Montrose has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.63% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
